meta.title: Methodology | LegacyMark
meta.description: Discover LegacyMark's strategic process: how we transform brands through a proven methodology in diagnosis, strategy, execution, and growth.

hero.description: A proven strategic process, designed to transform brands with measurable results. Every project follows four phases establishing clarity, precise execution, and sustained growth.

0.title: Deep Diagnostics
0.description: We analyze your brand, market, and competition with data intelligence tools. We identify gaps, opportunities, and the real positioning you have versus the one you aim for.

1.title: Tailored Strategy
1.description: We design a personalized strategic plan with clear objectives, measurable KPIs, and an action roadmap. No generic templates — each strategy is as unique as your brand.

2.title: High-Level Execution
2.description: Our senior team implements the strategy with precision: content that connects, campaigns that convert, and systems that scale.

3.title: Measurement and Optimization
3.description: We measure everything. We optimize constantly. Data guides every decision to maximize your return on investment and accelerate growth.

cta.title: Ready to get started?
cta.description: Apply our methodology to your brand and transform results in 90 days.

meta.title: About Us | LegacyMark
meta.description: Meet the LegacyMark team and our work philosophy focused on building legacies and transforming brands through validated methodologies.

hero.description: <highlight>We don't guess, we validate.</highlight> The heart of Legacy Mark is our data analysis methodology. Our commitment to accuracy allows us to deliver high-impact services, where investment efficiency is guaranteed by evidence, not intuition.

philosophy.subtitle: More than an agency, we are business growth architects.

mission.title: Mission
mission.description: We drive business development through marketing and advertising strategies based on each brand's DNA. We diagnose and resolve communication bottlenecks to transform our clients' potential into sales results and real positioning.

vision.title: Vision 2030
vision.description: To be the benchmark for tactical and strategic marketing in Latin America, recognized for transforming emerging brands into corporate legacies through high-impact results and sustainable growth.

personality.title: Personality
personality.description: We are a creative, innovative, and committed agency. Our kindness and approachability will stand out at the beginning of a conversation, as our legacy is to cultivate human warmth in every company working with us.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: The fundamental pillars supporting every strategic decision at LegacyMark.

creativity.title: Creativity

efficiency.title: Efficiency
efficiency.description: Maximum optimization of resources and time.

responsibility.title: Social Responsibility
responsibility.description: Positive impact on our community and environment.

team.title: Strategic Leadership
team.subtitle: Brilliant minds united by one obsession: your company's growth.

q3.a: Yes, we serve clients from Colombia, USA, Mexico, and Spain with bilingual teams.

location.p2: In-person meetings are available by appointment. We also connect via video call in any time zone.

p01.title: Forensic Audit
p01.desc: We dismantle your current processes, tech stack, and data flow. We find where you are losing money and where your data is disconnected.

p02.title: Strategic Architecture
p02.desc: We design the new operating system. We select the Enterprise Tech Stack (ERP, CRM, BI), define KPI dashboards, and map the Customer Journey.

p03.title: Deployment & Integration
p03.desc: The build phase. We migrate data, configure API connections, automation flows, and train your key stakeholders.

p04.title: Aggressive Scaling
p04.desc: Continuous optimization cycle. We use the new data clarity to inject capital into profitable channels and ruthlessly cut what doesn't work.

cmo.desc: Expert marketing leadership without the cost of a full-time executive. We direct your strategy, manage your team, and are accountable for results.

growth.desc: Sniper consulting to solve specific revenue blocks. Pricing strategy, market expansion, and product-market fit.

problem.list3: Operational blindness due to lack of real reporting.

agents.title: Your New Star "Employees"
agents.desc: Pre-trained, instantiable, and infinitely scalable agents. They don't sleep, don't ask for time off, they just execute.

a1.desc: Interacts with leads. Qualifies interest, answers questions, and schedules meetings.

a2.desc: Orchestrates ERPs and CRMs. Moves data, invoices, and alerts anomalies.

roi.desc: Deploying a LegacyMark agent costs a fraction of an average salary, but produces exponentially superior results. No sick days, no errors.

faq.title: Engineering FAQs
faq.q1: Is it safe to connect my data?
faq.a1: Absolutely. We use bank-grade encryption (AES-256) and our integrations work via secure APIs with granular read/write permissions.
faq.a2: Our pre-trained agents can be deployed in 3-5 business days. For custom flows, 2-3 weeks.
faq.q3: What happens if the process changes?
faq.a3: Our agents are modular. Updating the logic is as simple as reconfiguring the decision node, without rewriting code.

cta.desc: Book a technical demo today. We will show you exactly how much time and money you can save in the first week.

services.s1Desc: Reels, TikToks and Shorts optimized to go viral. Hormozi-style script, production, and editing.
services.s2Desc: High-impact graphic design that stops the scroll. Thumbnails, carousels, and posts that convert.
services.s3Desc: Words that sell. Email sequences, captions, and scripts with 45%+ open rates.
services.s4Desc: We do not create blindly. We analyze metrics, trends, and competitors to maximize every action.

process.s1Desc: We analyze trends in real-time and design viral hooks for your specific niche.
process.s2Desc: Word-for-word scripts, storyboards, and a 30-day calendar ready for your approval.
process.s3Desc: 4K recording, professional lighting, and world-class creative direction.
process.s4Desc: Dynamic cuts, native animated subtitles, and motion graphics that stop the scroll.
process.s5Desc: Posting at peak hours, first 48h management, and detailed metrics report.

testimonials.t3Text: Positive ROI from month 1, and we tripled our subscriber base in 90 days.

performance.desc: Every millisecond counts. We optimize the Critical Rendering Path to achieve perfect scores that Google (and your users) love.

comparison.title: The Ugly Truth
comparison.desc: Most agencies sell $50 USD templates as "professional web design".

t1.title: MVP Launch
t1.desc: Ideal for startups that need to validate their product in the market quickly.

t2.title: Growth Scale
t2.desc: The complete suite for companies looking to dominate their digital niche.

faq.title: Technical Doubts Resolved
faq.a1: Wordpress loads slowly and is insecure. Next.js is the technology used by Netflix, Twitch, and Nike for instant speed.
faq.a2: Yes. We implement a Headless CMS (Sanity/Strapi) so you can visually edit texts and images without touching code.
faq.a3: 24/7 monitoring, security updates, daily backups, and direct technical support via WhatsApp.
faq.a4: An MVP can be ready in 2 weeks. A complete corporate site takes 4-6 weeks to ensure quality.
